zh.lifeSummary: 當Marguerite DE GISORS DE CHAUMONT於1105年出生在法國豪-諾門迪艾吉索斯時，她的父親Thibaud Ier  "Le Payen" DE GISORS43歲，母親Mathilde de Montmorency33歲。她和Sir William de Trie Chaumont-Aquillon至少有4個女兒。她去世於1147年享年42歲。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: CHAUMONT
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Gilles, Raoul, Yvon.  Spanish Alicia, Andres, Arturo, Beatriz, Elia, Jose, Julio, Miguel, Raul.
French: habitational name from any of numerous places called Chaumont ‘bald mountain’ (ultimately from Latin calvus mons), for example in Cher, Orne, Jura, Haute-Savoie.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Chaumont in Orne (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Marguerite DE GISORS DE CHAUMONT was born in 1105, in Gisors, Eure, Upper Normandy, France, her father, Thibaud Ier  "Le Payen" DE GISORS, was 43 and her mother, Mathilde de Montmorency, was 33. She had at least 4 daughters with Sir William de Trie Chaumont-Aquillon. She died in 1147, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marguerite DE GISORS DE CHAUMONT est née en 1105, à Gisors, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Thibaud Ier  "Le Payen" DE GISORS, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Mathilde de Montmorency, avait 33 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 filles avec Sir William de Trie Chaumont-Aquillon. Elle est décédée en 1147, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marguerite DE GISORS DE CHAUMONT 1105 in Gisors, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thibaud Ier  "Le Payen" DE GISORS 43 und ihre Mutter Mathilde de Montmorency 33. Sie hatte mit Sir William de Trie Chaumont-Aquillon mindestens 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1147 im Alter von 42 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite DE GISORS DE CHAUMONT è nata il nel 1105 nel Gisors, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Thibaud Ier  "Le Payen" DE GISORS, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Mathilde de Montmorency, aveva 33 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figlie con Sir William de Trie Chaumont-Aquillon. Morì nel 1147, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marguerite DE GISORS DE CHAUMONTが1105年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアギソルズで生まれた時，父Thibaud Ier  "Le Payen" DE GISORSは43歳，母Mathilde de Montmorencyは33歳であった。彼女はSir William de Trie Chaumont-Aquillonとの間に少なくとも4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1147年に42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marguerite DE GISORS DE CHAUMONT(이)가 1105년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 지소르스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thibaud Ier  "Le Payen" DE GISORS(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilde de Montmorency(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 Sir William de Trie Chaumont-Aquillon(와)과 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1147년 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite DE GISORS DE CHAUMONT nasceu em 1105, em Gisors, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Thibaud Ier  "Le Payen" DE GISORS, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde de Montmorency, tinha 33 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhas com Sir William de Trie Chaumont-Aquillon. Ela faleceu em 1147, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marguerite DE GISORS DE CHAUMONT родилась в 1105 г. в местности гисорс, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Thibaud Ier  "Le Payen" DE GISORS было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Mathilde de Montmorency, 33. У неё было по крайней мере 4 дочери от Sir William de Trie Chaumont-Aquillon. Она умерла в 1147 г. в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marguerite DE GISORS DE CHAUMONT nació en 1105, en Gisors, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Thibaud Ier  "Le Payen" DE GISORS, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Mathilde de Montmorency, tenía 33 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijas con Sir William de Trie Chaumont-Aquillon. Murió en 1147, a la edad de 42 años.
